summary: CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal (1 CANONICAL lcs_canonical + 1 ERROR lcs_errors), Registry-First (2 new tables pre-registered before CREATE), Sovereign ID (no unauthorized minting), No sideways calls. The 3 v0 tables (cid_intake, sid_registry, mid_ledger) are addressed via UPDATE reclassification (lines 38-43) which silently matches 0 rows because v0 never registered them. movement_type_registry is not addressed at all. After migration runs, only 2 of 6 LCS tables exist in ctb.table_registry. FIX REQUIRED: Replace UPDATE reclassification with INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for all 6 tables: lcs_canonical (CANONICAL), lcs_errors (ERROR), cid_intake (SUPPORTING), sid_registry (SUPPORTING), mid_ledger (SUPPORTING), movement_type_registry (REGISTRY). NON-BLOCKING: dispatch state skip still possible (v0 finding, not v1 scope).
